  "findings": [
    "Backfill lifts exceed the maximum thickness specified for the compaction equipment used",
    "Inadequate compaction density due to excessive lift thickness"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Excavate the improperly compacted backfill layers down to the pipe bedding zone",
    "Re-lay and compact the backfill in lifts matching the equipment manufacturer and project specification limits (typically 6 to 8 inches loose depth)"
  ],
  "rationale": "The backfill lifts are too thick for the compactor to achieve the required soil density, which can lead to soil settlement, pipe deflection, and structural failure of the utility line. This violates standard project specifications and IPC 306 guidelines regarding proper support and backfilling of trenching.",
  "references": [
    "IPC 306",
    "Project Specifications Section 312333 (Trenching and Backfilling)"
  ]
}
